title: Actually Subtractions
description: An unofficial backport of Actually Additions to 1.20.1!
body:
![ACTUALLY SUBTRACTIONS](https://github.com/MelnCat/ActuallyAdditions/blob/port/1.20.1/pics/logo_minus.png?raw=true)

An unofficial 1.20.1 backport of Actually Additions, a tech mod.

So far, all features have been ported over. Several include:

- The atomic reconstructor, used to turn resources into crystals.
- Machines for automatically doing stuff, such as the auto-placer for automatically placing blocks, auto-breaker for breaking blocks, and the farmer to farm. In this port, the auto-breaker can utilize the top-left slot to break blocks, if a tool is needed.
- The empowerer for empowering crystals into their empowered form.
- Canola for oil production, which can be a powerful source of energy.
- Lasers for logistics, allowing transport of energy, items, and fluids.
- And much more.

**DO NOT REPORT ISSUES TO THE ORIGINAL AUTHORS! 
ANYTHING THAT BREAKS IS MY FAULT, NOT THEIRS!**

![actually additions machines in 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/feaec285adb0e3dd3c6b7c9016f22f035ddd983d.png)

[Support the original author!](https://ellpeck.de/#support)

I did not make this mod, the original author, developers, and artist did. I simply ported it to 1.20.1.
